name: Mira Kessan
faction: Independent (twin to Kessan — both operate as info brokers)

equipment.armour: elegant street clothes with hidden pockets

sd_appearance: Human woman of average height and build, clad in a layered ensemble of deep burgundy and indigo silks, her long black hair woven with silver threads, and eyes as dark as a moonless night. Hidden dagger at her waist, a silver feather quill tucked behind her ear, and a single silver eye-patch covering her right eye. Her outfit, while stylish and elegant, is adorned with a multitude of hidden pockets, suggesting a chameleon-like ability to blend into any crowd.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: always different outfit — never the same twice, always appropriate to the situation
